description: Unique identifier for a single trial within a session or condition.
Experimental condition assigned to the trial. Either "congruent", "incongruent", or "other"

The linguistic or visual stimulus presented to the participant in a given trial. This is formatted in a way that indicates the sequential presentation of the sentence and which words were on screen at a given moment, e.g., ['The', 'man', 'that the', 'nurse', 'phoned', 'left', 'his', 'pills', 'at', 'the', 'office']
Additional annotation about the 'stimulus' variable, noting whether it is an 'object' or 'subject' extracted relative clause sentence, or 'other'
In response to the 'stimulus' sentence, this variable indicates the comprehension question participants answered.
In relation to the 'comprehension_probe' variable, this variable annotates whether that probe targeted the main or relative clause of the sentence.
Participant's response. - either 'y' for yes or 'n' for no
Binary indicator of whether the participant's response was correct.
Time taken by the participant to respond, in milliseconds. This is timed relative to the onset of the comprehension probe.
Unique identifier assigned to each participant.
Self-reported or observed gender identity of the participant.
Age of the participant at the time of the experiment (in years)
